mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.STATUS_SEQ, A.WORK_INDCT_NUM, A.CUST_NUM, COALESCE((SELECT CUST_COMP_NM FROM sat_cust WHERE CUST_NUM = A.CUST_NUM), A.CUST_NUM) AS CUST_NM, A.EQUT_CD, A.PROD_CD, B.PROD_MM AS PROD_NM, A.MAIN_WORK_INDCT_NUM, A.INSERT_DTTM, A.SCAN_START_DTTM, A.START_DTTM, A.END_DTTM FROM tb_jacup A LEFT JOIN sat_prod B ON A.PROD_CD = B.PROD_CD WHERE A.INSERT_DTTM >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) ORDER BY A.INSERT_DTTM ASC
